name: @intentsolutionsio/database-schema-designer
description: Design and visualize database schemas with normalization guidance, relationship mapping, and ERD generation

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install database-schema-designer\\n  or /plugin install database-schema-designer@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
